content:
# Khursaniyah Field

**Summary**: A carbonate reservoir field in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011]] focused on the khursaniyah-field to develop a high-resolution stratigraphic model.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011]] domal anticline

## Formations Present

- [[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011]] Arab-A, Arab-B, Arab-C, Arab-D, Hanifa

## Key Findings From This Location

- The structure is a NE-SW, doubly-plunging near domal anticline with maximum dips of 9 to 10 degrees. ([[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011, p. 31]])
